border_weight_excessive.signal: heavy or black border weight dominates the interface
border_weight_excessive.why_it_matters: Border-heavy surfaces read as wireframe or internal-tool scaffolding instead of intentional product UI.
border_weight_excessive.recommended_fix: Reduce border weight, soften framing, and move emphasis into spacing, contrast and typographic hierarchy.

shadow_style_heavy.signal: hard repeated shadows carry the visual weight
shadow_style_heavy.why_it_matters: Harsh shadow repetition often makes the surface feel noisy, dated or amateur.
shadow_style_heavy.recommended_fix: Use softer elevation, fewer shadow layers and clearer hierarchy between flat, raised and interactive elements.

card_repetition.signal: too many equally weighted cards or panels
card_repetition.why_it_matters: Card repetition flattens pacing and makes the surface feel templated instead of composed.
card_repetition.recommended_fix: Vary section rhythm, consolidate repeated cards and create stronger differences between content zones.

weak_visual_hierarchy.signal: headline, body, CTA and section structure feel equally weighted
weak_visual_hierarchy.why_it_matters: Without hierarchy the user can parse the interface functionally but not confidently or quickly.
weak_visual_hierarchy.recommended_fix: Refactor layout, scale, spacing and hero structure so priority is obvious at a glance.

weak_button_hierarchy.signal: actions lack primary, secondary and tertiary intent
weak_button_hierarchy.why_it_matters: Button hierarchy is core to conversion clarity and product confidence.
weak_button_hierarchy.recommended_fix: Define stronger primary-action emphasis and reduce weight on secondary or passive actions.

poor_spacing.signal: the UI feels cramped, heavy or under-aired
poor_spacing.why_it_matters: Weak spacing directly lowers perceived quality and makes even good content feel amateur.
poor_spacing.recommended_fix: Increase breathing room, rebalance rhythm and simplify dense clusters before handoff.

weak_color_system.signal: palette choices do not form a clear system
weak_color_system.why_it_matters: A weak palette makes the UI look generic or inconsistent even when structure is correct.
weak_color_system.recommended_fix: Strengthen the color system through explicit roles, contrast notes and differentiated accent usage.

typography_without_intent.signal: type choices look default or under-directed
typography_without_intent.why_it_matters: Typography carries tone, hierarchy and maturity; weak type makes the whole surface feel unfinished.
typography_without_intent.recommended_fix: Choose more intentional heading/body relationships and document the rationale in the brand profile.

wireframe_look.signal: the interface looks like a placeholder wireframe rather than a finished surface
wireframe_look.why_it_matters: Wireframe energy can be useful in exploration, but it should not pass as finished design quality.
wireframe_look.recommended_fix: Move from skeleton-like framing toward an actual visual system with intentional hierarchy, tone and polish.

amateur_internal_tool_look.signal: the surface resembles an under-designed internal tool
amateur_internal_tool_look.why_it_matters: This is a strong trust and quality risk even when the flow is functionally correct.
amateur_internal_tool_look.recommended_fix: Refactor the visual system so the interface feels deliberate, lighter and more product-grade.

excessive_horizontal_spread.signal: the layout spreads too widely without strong control
excessive_horizontal_spread.why_it_matters: Overly wide compositions reduce scannability and make hierarchy harder to hold together.
excessive_horizontal_spread.recommended_fix: Constrain widths, cluster related regions and tighten the reading path.

unclear_state_feedback.signal: success, degraded and error states are not visually legible
unclear_state_feedback.why_it_matters: Weak state representation lowers usability and makes the system feel unfinished.
unclear_state_feedback.recommended_fix: Clarify the visual language for positive, warning and error states before handoff.

generic_dashboard_pattern.signal: the UI falls back to familiar dashboard template defaults
generic_dashboard_pattern.why_it_matters: Generic dashboard patterns erase product personality and make the output interchangeable.
generic_dashboard_pattern.recommended_fix: Use the brand profile and visual intent to break template sameness with more explicit compositional choices.

brutalism_misapplied.signal: brutalist moves are used without coherent rationale or refinement
brutalism_misapplied.why_it_matters: Poorly applied brutalism often reads as unfinished or hostile instead of intentional.
brutalism_misapplied.recommended_fix: Either refine the brutalist rationale into a coherent system or simplify back toward a cleaner visual direction.
